content: The onboarding flow is really confusing. I didn't know where to start after signing up and almost gave up in the first 5 minutes.
problem: confusing onboarding flow, unclear starting point

content: I can't export my data to CSV. Every other tool I use lets me do this and it's a dealbreaker for my weekly reporting.
problem: Cannot export data to CSV

content: The dashboard loads so slowly when I have more than 50 projects. My team had to stop using it because it times out.
problem: Dashboard loads slowly with many projects

content: Notifications are completely broken. I set up email alerts for new comments but I've never received a single one.
problem: Email alerts for new comments are not working

content: Would love a dark mode. I work late nights and the white screen is brutal on my eyes.
problem: Lack of dark mode strains eyes

content: The mobile experience is terrible. Half the buttons don't work on my phone and I can't scroll through the list properly.
problem: mobile experience is broken and unusable

content: I wish I could invite teammates. Right now everything is stuck in my account and I can't collaborate with my PM or designer.
problem: Cannot invite teammates to collaborate

content: Search doesn't work at all. I typed in the exact name of a project and got zero results. Had to scroll through everything manually.
problem: Search returns no relevant results

content: The pricing page is misleading. I thought I was on the free plan but got charged $49 at the end of the month with no warning.
problem: Unexpected charge after free plan

content: Can you add keyboard shortcuts? Power users like me live in the keyboard and the mouse-only workflow slows me down a lot.
problem: Lack of keyboard shortcuts for power users

content: The import from Notion doesn't work. It just says "processing" forever and nothing shows up. I've tried 4 times.
problem: Notion import stuck processing forever

content: I love the core idea but the AI suggestions are way too generic. It just tells me obvious things I already know. Needs to be smarter.
problem: AI suggestions are too generic

content: There's no undo button. I accidentally deleted a whole project and lost hours of work. This is a critical missing feature.
problem: No undo button, lost project data

content: The editor keeps losing my work when I switch tabs. I've lost the same paragraph three times today. Super frustrating.
problem: Editor loses work when switching tabs

content: Would be amazing if you integrated with Slack so I could get updates without having to log into yet another tool.
problem: No Slack integration for updates

content: The signup process asks for my credit card before I can try anything. I'd like to at least see the product before committing.
problem: Credit card required before product trial

content: Filtering is really limited. I need to filter by date range AND tag at the same time but it only lets me pick one.
problem: Cannot filter by date range and tag simultaneously

content: The API documentation is outdated. Half the endpoints listed don't exist or return different responses than what's documented.
problem: API documentation is outdated and inaccurate

content: I keep getting logged out randomly in the middle of sessions. Happens maybe twice a day and I lose whatever I was working on.
problem: Random logouts causing loss of work

content: The bulk actions feature only works on 10 items at a time. I have 200 entries I need to update and doing it in batches of 10 is painful.
problem: Bulk actions limited to 10 items
